productDisplayName: Fila Men DLS Slam White Sports Shoe
description: Win those baskets in style with these fila DLS Game Basketball shoes. With a simple-yet-stylish design, enriched with DLS foam cushioning and a grippy outsole, this shoe designed to bring out the winner in you. Upper Synthetic leather upper with perforations for absolute durability, breathable comfort and style High ankle collar for better support to the lower leg Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for snug and fresh all-day comfort Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorption Dynamic Landing System (DLS) for better impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole textured along the centre length and has herringbone grooves on the rest of the outsole for absolute grip and traction on various courts Curved midfoot for enhanced inner arch ergonomic support Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
